headline: US 🇺🇸⚔️ Iran 🇮🇷💥 STRIKE FIESTA 🎉 KILLS Khamenei ☠️👴
text: US Centcom 🪖💥 just SMASHED 💣 90 Iranian targets 🎯 near Strait of Hormuz 🌊🚢 while Iran says 14 folks 💀 were sent to the big shrine in the sky 😇. Mourners packed Mashhad 🕌💐 waving flags 🇮🇷 and holding 'TRUMP IS TOAST' 🍞🔥 signs for Khamenei's funeral ☠️🕯️! Khamenei got iced on Feb 28 during the first US-Israeli 🔥💥 blitz and now his burial is a revenge party 🎊😡! Iran fired back at US spots in Kuwait 🏜️, Bahrain 🌴 and Qatar 🐪 plus Jordan and Iraq 🇯🇴🇮🇶, hitting ports and navy sites 🚢🔥. Bridges and rail to Mashhad got KO'd too 🌉🚂. US says it's just 'degrading' Iran's shipping smack-talk ability 🗣️📉 but oil tankers are now in SINGLE DIGITS 😱📉 down from 130 a day! Trump 🍊👑 called Iran 'scum' 🦠 and ditched the June MoU deal like yesterday's kebab 🥙🗑️. Iran foreign min roasted him back with 'action not vulgarity' 💪🗣️ while ships go ghost-mode 👻🚢 and Hormuz gets locked like Fort Knox 🔒💰. Gulf nations caught stray missiles 💥🇧🇭🇰🇼🇶🇦 and everyone’s screaming 'WAR CRIME' 😱⚖️ but the cycle of boom-bust is hitting wallets 💸 and seafarers hard 😩⛴️!
